reviews.title: Very good price-point for Laptop portability and Features
reviews.text:
Rating this PINKCAT wireless mouse is difficult in terms of "stars". The price-point and your intended use are big factors.

I'll get one thing out of the way to save you some time - if you're a gamer, I would say that this is not going to have the stable accuracy you need. In fact, I think it will frustrate gamers, so if you're a gamer then you need to move on/up to something more expensive. Just my opinion.

My usage is for work. Lots and lots of work - like 12-15 hours a day of non-stop "click click click" work, so I'm basing my review on that and in comparison, to my main "workhorse" mouse.

My main mouse is a Logitech Anywhere MX, which is an incredible mouse but is also about $50 more than this PINKCAT mouse. I wanted to find something similar in both size and features as my more expensive mouse but with silent click and more as a backup, and for basic uses this fits the bill pretty well.

As you can see in the photos, this mouse is only slightly larger than a Logitech Anywhere MX, so it's still plenty small enough for laptop / portable / small space use. Now that you know what I'm comparing it to, I'll get right to the pros & cons.

PROS:

- Very light-weight, significantly lighter than my MX, yet still similar in size & shape.

- The "silent" buttons are truly that! Something I wish was a feature with my noisy MX buttons.

- Only requires one AA battery (my MX requires two) and excellent battery life.

- Scroll-wheel is smooth, quiet, and comfortable.

- The dull mat style surface is very comfy and doesn't get sticky like the shiny slick surface of my MX.

- The "back" and "forward" thumb-buttons work as expected for quick switching back & forth on web pages and tabs / locations in file explorer folders.

CONS:

- Even with the "3 Grade Adjustable DPI" function, I wouldn't recommend this mouse for gaming or fine digital artwork in apps like Photoshop.

- The signal and receiver seem to be a little easily susceptible to signal issues and occasional jitter, but that could be due to the number of various devices I have in the room. When I first tested it out there seemed to be a lot of jitter and the cursor jumped around a bit, but after switching it to a different system than the one I used my MX on, and adjusting the mouse settings a bit in Windows, it has been pretty smooth.

- No side-to-side push with the scroll wheel, unlike my MX. (But again, we're talking $8 compared to $58).

- Battery compartment door is flimsy. It's OK, but handle with care when popping it open.

Overall, this mouse is fine for basic use, and for its price-point it's excellent.

This was really hard to rate in terms of "stars" , especially coming from the perspective of someone who owns a more finely tuned & designed expensive mouse. So... for the price and for basic use I'd give it 5 stars, but for smooth accuracy it's not going to measure-up to something like a high-end Logitech and would be more like 3 stars in that aspect. But for 8 bucks It's a great mouse - gets the job done for standard computer uses, and it's definitely light, silent buttons! So over all I have to give it 4 stars.

reviews.title: It's a mouse, it works.
reviews.text:
When purchasing a bluetooth mouse, or any bluetooth device, an important factor is how well it connects and how well it STAYS connected. After all this time, the industry still can’t make up its mind about how bluetooth works:
- Microsoft with their mouse and Sony with their controller that pair without the need of a code (which Android’s bluetooth stack doesn’t support).
- Mice and keyboards that will not reconnect after it wakes from sleep mode.
- To this day, bluetooth devices still can’t wake a computer from suspend state.
So when I get a simple bluetooth mouse for a good price, and it actually works as expected, I was happy.

For my review, I’m comparing the Bornd mouse to the [[ASIN:B006428K7I Motorola 89519N Bluetooth Mouse]] which I got in a set that included the [[ASIN:B004L9MBH6 Motorola Wireless Keyboard for Motorola ATRIX and XOOM (Motorola Retail Packaging)]].

With the Motorola mouse, its frequency somehow conflicts with the Motorola keyboard, resulting in sticky keys, as in “I’m having a good daaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaay”. Conversely, the keyboard interferes with the mouse where the computer would actually lose connection with the mouse for a few seconds after typing, or lose connection completely.

What I liked about the Bornd:
- Pairing was simple using the button at the bottom of the mouse.
- Operating distance is about 5 feet, but this may be because of my computer’s bluetooth antenna
- Takes a single AA battery which lasts over a month of moderate use (2 hours per day)
- Mouse movement is good. No need to adjust mouse speed in the control panel.
- Accuracy is good. Editing images using Pixlr.com, I’m able to select precisely the parts of the image I need.

What gave me trouble with the Bornd:
- When you first put your hand on this mouse, you will not feel that it is very well built. The plastic is completely smooth and the mouse wheel seems to rattle when you shake it. I got used to it after a few minutes, though.
- The mouse reconnects with the computer most of the time, but sometimes it was necessary to turn the mouse off and on again after the computer reboots or if the computer was out of range for an extended period of time.
- Lately, I’ve been experiencing double-clicks when I click on the left mouse button once. I’m usually able to fix this by getting angry and slamming the mouse down a couple of times. This may indicate a build quality issue with this mouse.

In my specific case, the Bournd did not interfere with my Motorola keyboard at all and it seems the sticky key occurs only when the batteries on the keyboard runs low.

reviews.title: I really do "love it".

The device was recognized and connected to the notebook with no unusual delays or difficulties.  it works well with the PC as I recline in my easy-chair, using small motions upon the arm of the chair and allowing me to navigate through email and web browsing and to play games.  It is a nice compliment to the available on-screen gesture controls of the computer, especially for a die-hard convert from Windows XP and Windows 7 operating systems.

reviews.title: Amazing l! Always get what I order with fast shipping and selections to choose from!!
reviews.text: I’m always satisfied with anything I have ordered from Amazon and they nailed it with this order. Since I was drooping sizes I wasn’t sure!!  Super fast shipping!!! I had placed a big order, 3 days after placing order, I was opening my packages, and that’s counting the evening I placed my order!  I received  all my order at same time,I had to order several clothing items due to a major  weight loss because of illness!!!! Everything I have is too big for me now so I had nothing to wear and when I say nothing, I mean NOTHING!!! I had to order smaller sized clothes  so I’d have some clothes to wear!! I’m talking about losing 28lbs, which doctors say I’m  probably not gonna gain back, maybe  5-10lbs if I’m lucky!!!  All I been wearing is my pj’s and yes had to order some pj’s!!!!! I’m normally a small, sizes 5,6,7, weight 120-125, small frame,and am 5’3” tall. So I can’t afford to lose weight esp. 28lbs which was all lost over a 4 wk period of time, I have trouble keeping weight on me anyway!! And I can’t gorge myself with the foods that will make me gain weight cause I’m a diabetic!! So I’m in a no-win situation!!!! Thank you Amazon for giving me some cloths to wear. I ordered sizes 2-5 in slacks or jeans, small or 5-6 pj’s, small or med tops, small or 5-6 lounge clothing, so I’d say they are true to size at least for me they are. So hope that helps with ur sizing if u not sure!! Cause all the clothing was in that size range and I have 2  items that is to big out of all the clothing I ordered. Grouped all clothing in this review on size instead of  each individual piece of clothing!!! So go with ur size u are changing to and Amazon measurements to make sure and by looking at my before and after size, weight that should get u right on size u need to order.

reviews.title: Perfect Replacement For M505
reviews.text: My M505 finally quit working dependably for me after nearly 3 years of dedicated service. I loved the design and how I never had to change the batteries, not even once in those 3 years. So I sought out another one only to find they are no longer made. But I did discover this M525 and after a little research I purchased. I am extremely happy with this newer version of my older mouse. It is nearly identical to my M505, so close in fact that I have yet to notice any major differences except for the color. I recommend this M525 to anyone who likes the freedom of a wireless mouse and doesn't want to bother with changing batteries!

reviews.title: GREAT BUY!
reviews.text:
I had purchased an ergonomic mouse prior to this one. It was rechargeable as well and died less than an hour after lite use. It was not very comfortable and felt cheap. When i received this one I was skeptical because it did feel lite weight and I worried it would be cheap quality. It is comfortable & light weight, rechargeable long lasting charge. I use it for work it lasts all day and since I work from home I used it at night as well without needing a recharge until bed time. I have switched to regular mouse a couple times when i forgot to charge mine and there is a huge difference in comfort. I have a hand injury and when i use a regular mouse my hand hurts, after using this one I see a big difference when I have had to switch back. Highly recommend.

** update: i’ve now had this for several months and I have actually ordered another one which I haven’t had to take out of the box. I honestly ordered it because I lost the charging cord to my first one which I rarely use. I think I charge this mouse maybe once a week if that and I use it up to 15 hours a day with work and it never dies.

reviews.title: Love this mouse!
reviews.text: This is the 3rd one so I can have 2 at work in case I forget to charge it I have a backup and 1 at home.  The buttons aren't as quiet on this one and it's not that pretty shiny purple as pictured but if you're an Admin Asst like me you will love it! It took away my shoulder and wrist pain.

title: Bluetooth Mouse for iPad MacBook Air Pro Mini Mac iPhone Tablet Cell Phone, Computer Wireless Mouse for Laptop PC Desktop, Dual Mode (Bluetooth + 2.4G), Portable Optical Cordless Mice Silent (Silver)
description:
Specifications:
Bluetooth Edition: Bluetooth 5.0 Mouse Dimensions: 4.21 X 2.36 X 1.26 inchs Mouse Weight: 2.05 ounces Operating Range: Up to 33 ft/ 10 meters Buttons Number: 3 Keys DPI Level: 1600 DPI Battery Powered: 1 AA battery powered,
Battery NOT Included
The mouse supports Bluetooth and 2.4GHz USB connection
Note: The Bluetooth Mouse only compatible with iPad OS/iOS 13 and above. So you need to update the system of your ipad and iphone to iPad OS/iOS 13 and above, and turn on “Assistive Touch”: Setting> Accessibility> Touch> Assistive Touch, then connect the mouse.
How to connect Bluetooth mouse:
1: Turn on the power ON/OFF, switch to Bluetooth. 2: Then Turn on the Bluetooth switch of your tablet or mobile phone, and search for Bluetooth mouse. 3: Click the Bluetooth mouse on tablet phone or other devices to connect to your device.
How to connect 2.4GHz USB mouse:
1: Turn on the power ON/OFF, switch to 2.4G. 2: Then insert the USB receiver into the USB port of the notebook or computer, and then you can use it.
Package Included:
1x Dual Mode Mouse (Bluetooth+2.4GHz) 1x USB Receiver 1x User Manual
Broad Compatibility:
Compatible with iPadOS iPad 10.2/9.7 5th 6th 7th 8th 9th gen, iPad Air 10.5/10.9, iPad Pro 11/12.9 2nd 3rd 4th 5th generation, iPad Mini 5/4/3, iPhone 12 11 pro max, iPhone X XS XR max, etc.
Q&A
Where is the USB receiver?
The USB receiver is in the mouse, you can find it when you open the mouse's battery cover. When you don't use it, you can plug the nano receiver into the USB storage slot again, so you don't lose the USB.
Connectivity and USB troubleshooting
Restart your computer and make sure the mouse is turned on and not too far away from the USB Receiver.
Warranty: 18 months warranty, and our friendly customer service.
Bluetooth mouse only compatible with iPad OS/ iOS 13 and above.
features: Wide Compatibility: The mouse compatible with Windows XP/ Vista/ 7/ 8/ 10/ 11, Chrome OS, Mac OS, Android, iOS, and perfect for laptop notebook PC computer desktop chromebook, Apple iPhone iPad, iPad Air, iPad Mini, iPad Pro, MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, Mac iMac Samsung Galaxy Tab/ Note/ S tablet smartphone Surface Pro and other multi device.【Bluetooth mouse compatible with iPad OS/ iOS 13 and above, turn on “Assistive Touch”: Setting> Accessibility> Touch> Assistive Touch】

Dual-Mode Mouse (2.4G + Bluetooth 5.0): 2.4GHz wireless mode, plug and play, no need to download drivers. Bluetooth mode, easy to connect and pair. Both modes provide a reliable and stable connection up to 33 feet with virtually no drop-outs and delays. The wireless mouse realizes free switches between two devices with one mouse only by one click. Note: You can't use Bluetooth and 2.4G mode at the same time. The USB dongle is stored in the compartment next to the mouse battery slot.

Comfortable & Quiet Click: The wireless mouse features a hand-friendly contoured shape for all-day comfort. Quiet clicks allow you to focus on your work without worrying about disturbing others or causing unwanted distracting noises. 1600 DPI cursor sensitivity provides smooth, precise tracking and scrolling for easy navigation on most surfaces. The sturdy rubber scroll wheel prevents your hands from slipping when rolling. The nano receiver is stored on the back of the mouse.

Long Battery Life: The mouse is powered by 1 AA battery (battery is not included). The mouse will enter into auto-sleep mode after 10 minutes of inactivity, and you can click any key to wake it up. Long battery life and working time, it can be used for months without battery replacement. There is an ON/ OFF button on the back of the mouse, which can be turned off to save power. Battery NOT included.

Protable & Durable Design: The ergonomic design and smooth surface fit your hands perfectly and provide you with a comfortable experience. You can take it anywhere you need it for office, home, meetings or travel. Tested over 3 million clicks to ensure mouse durability. What You Will Get: Wireless Bluetooth Mouse, USB Receiver, User Manual, 18 months warranty, and our friendly customer service.

reviews.title: I couldn't have asked for a better productivity tool
reviews.text:
This item has been with me for such a short time that I am still breaking it in. So far these are my notes.

This mouse takes advantage of both Bluetooth and 2.4G technology

The connection tends to become unstable after a few months, reconnect to solve the issue

If you are unfortunate enough to have more than one device with need for a mouse, switching between them will be time consuming and confusing due to the syncing required.

Its slim profile also makes it easy to store when not in use.

The battery life lasts for weeks

The power conserving switch saves battery life

Totally worth the price!

I hope this is helpful.

reviews.title: Comfortable to hold & easy to pair

He says it's quiet and responsive. We haven't had it long enough to comment on battery longevity, but so far so good.
